prompt:
You are a research agent. Conduct thorough research on the following sub-topic.

## Research Sub-Topic
**Title**: Architecture Overview: 5-Layer OOP Class Hierarchy, 7 Pipelines, and 32 AgentRoles
**Description**: Research and document the foundational architecture of UMAF. Map the 5-layer OOP class hierarchy (Data types → Infrastructure → Agent core → Concrete roles → Pipeline classes) showing how each layer builds on the previous. Catalog all 7 pipelines (Coder, Research, CoderPP, Topology, Skill, Feature, SelfEvolution) with their graph topologies, node counts, and flow routing. Provide a complete taxonomy of all 32 AgentRole subclasses organized by pipeline, including their inheritance from the AgentRole ABC and their specific responsibilities. Explain how BaseAgent, AgentRole, and BasePipeline form the architectural backbone.

## Instructions
1. Use **WebSearch** to find additional papers, articles, and technical documentation. Run multiple searches with different query angles.
2. For any arxiv.org or academic URLs found in search results: do NOT try to fetch them directly (domain verification will block them). Instead, note the URLs in your findings so the framework can download them later.
3. Synthesize your findings using your own reasoning. Identify patterns, compare approaches, and note trade-offs.
4. Use **Write** to save your complete findings to the file: `research_01_Architecture_Overview:_5-Layer_OOP_Class_Hierarchy,_7_Pipeli.md`
   Organize your findings into these sections:
   - **Overview**: 2-3 paragraph summary covering the core ideas and motivation
   - **Key Methods & Approaches**: detailed technical explanation of how each method works, with comparisons
   - **Important Papers & References**: list key papers with authors, venue, year, and a 1-2 sentence note on their contribution
   - **Open Questions & Future Directions**: current limitations and active research frontiers
   - **Relevance to Main Topic**: how this connects to broader research
5. After writing, use **Read** to verify the file was written correctly with all sections present.
6. Output TASK_COMPLETE when done.

Focus on technical depth, concrete details, and accuracy. Your research will be scored and ranked on depth, accuracy, relevance, clarity, and originality.
response:
The research document has been verified. All five required sections are present and complete:

- **Overview**: 3 paragraphs covering the 5-layer hierarchy, 7 pipelines, 32 AgentRoles, and architectural motivation
- **Key Methods & Approaches**: 6 detailed subsections — (1) the 5-layer OOP hierarchy mapped layer by layer with file:line references, (2) all 7 pipelines with graph topologies, flow routing tables, and key mechanisms, (3) complete 32-AgentRole taxonomy in per-pipeline tables, (4) the architectural backbone of BaseAgent/AgentRole/BasePipeline, (5) tool assignment architecture, (6) resilience patterns
- **Important Papers & References**: 8 entries with authors/venue/year and contribution notes
- **Open Questions & Future Directions**: 10 items covering topology execution, pipeline composition, streaming, sandboxing, cost, parallelism, memory, multi-model, observability, and evaluation
- **Relevance to Main Topic**: Connects the architectural analysis to broader UMAF understanding

TASK_COMPLETE
